hero.subtitle: Centralize your group's treasury. Automate contributions, secure disbursements, compute shares in real time.
hero.trustLine: Free · No credit card required · Live in 5 min

features.title: Everything you need to run a cooperative
features.subtitle: Tools designed for informal groups: easy to adopt, rigorous on security.

autoContributions.title: Automatic contributions
autoContributions.description: Set the rules once — Miks debits, allocates and computes shares. No more spreadsheet acrobatics.

vaults.title: Multiple vaults
vaults.description: Liquidity, Investment, Security. Every euro knows where it should go — and Miks makes sure it does.

doubleSignature.title: Double signature
doubleSignature.description: No money moves without two validations. By email, OTP code, or both.

realTimeShares.title: Real-time shares
realTimeShares.description: The dashboard shows each member's exact share, down to the second.

audit.title: Immutable audit
audit.description: Every action is logged, timestamped, signed. No admin can edit history.

governance.title: Shared governance
governance.description: Fine-grained roles: treasurer, chair, member, observer. Permissions per workspace.

reports.title: Automatic reports
reports.description: Monthly reports, CSV exports, projections. Everything for your year-end general assembly.

howItWorks.title: Operational in 5 minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. Zero paperwork. Zero training.

workspace.title: Create your workspace
workspace.description: Group name, currency, contribution rules. Miks configures everything in under 60 seconds.

invite.title: Invite your members
invite.description: By link or email. Each member creates an account, verifies their identity, and receives their initial share.

operate.title: Operate in real time
operate.description: Contributions, disbursements, alerts. Everyone sees the same thing at the same moment.

1.quote: Miks replaced 3 spreadsheets and a paper notebook. We stopped arguing about shares.

2.quote: Double signature saved us from a 200K FCFA fraud attempt. The suspect could never validate.

3.quote: All 24 of my members see the same thing. No more 'how much do you owe me' loops.

finalCta.title: Ready to take control of your collective savings?
finalCta.description: Join the hundreds of cooperatives that trust Miks to secure their financial future.
finalCta.trustLine: Free · No credit card required · Setup in 5 min

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when your cooperative grows.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: For new cooperatives testing the waters

cooperative.name: Cooperative
cooperative.tagline: For active groups up to 100 members

faq.title: Questions? We have answers.
faq.subtitle: If you can't find what you're looking for, ping us.

dataSecurity.question: Where is my data stored?
dataSecurity.answer: All data is stored on PostgreSQL databases hosted in EU-based data centers (Scaleway). Backups are encrypted and replicated across 3 availability zones.

doubleSignature.question: What does "double signature" mean exactly?
doubleSignature.answer: Every money movement (cotisation or disbursement) requires two distinct members to validate the action via email + OTP. Neither can act alone, even with admin access.

pricing.question: Can I try Miks for free?
pricing.answer: Yes. The Free plan supports up to 10 members forever. For larger groups, you get a 14-day trial of the Cooperative plan without any credit card.

migration.question: Can I import my existing data?
migration.answer: Yes. We support CSV imports for member lists, historical transactions, and shares. Our team helps with the migration at no cost on the Cooperative and Federation plans.

language.question: Which languages are supported?
language.answer: The interface is available in English and French today. We add new languages as our user base grows — your language might be next.

security.title: Bank-grade security, by design
security.subtitle: Every layer of Miks is built around a single principle: no one person, not even an admin, can move money alone.

doubleSignature.title: Double signature
doubleSignature.description: Every outflow requires validation by two distinct members via email + OTP. The initiator is never a validator.

encryption.title: End-to-end encryption
encryption.description: All traffic is TLS 1.3. Passwords are hashed with Argon2id. Sensitive data at rest is encrypted with AES-256.

euHosting.title: European hosting
euHosting.description: Data and backups live in EU data centers (Scaleway), GDPR-compliant by default. No third-country transfers.

dataIsolation.title: Workspace isolation
dataIsolation.description: Each workspace has its own dedicated row-level permissions. There is no cross-workspace query path.

roles.title: Granular roles
roles.description: Treasurer, validator, member, observer — fine-tune who can do what. Role changes are audit-logged.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have access to this resource.

settings.subtitle: Manage your account and security preferences.

twofa.title: Two-factor authentication
twofa.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account with a TOTP authenticator app.
twofa.enabledHint: Your account is protected with a second factor.
twofa.disabledHint: Enable 2FA to secure your account against unauthorised access.
twofa.setupError: Could not start 2FA setup. Please try again.

setup.scanDescription: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.).
setup.apps: Compatible with Google Authenticator, Authy, Microsoft Authenticator, and any TOTP app.
setup.verifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to confirm the setup.
setup.doneDescription: Your account is now protected with two-factor authentication.

disableDialog.title: Disable two-factor authentication
disableDialog.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to confirm.
disableDialog.warning: Disabling 2FA will reduce the security of your account.
